debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α

inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α

R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a : α
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount A R a (↑i) ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:
have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  exact IndepFun.of_identDistrib_left

    (measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i => measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a i))

  have h_meas1 : Measurable (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) :=
    measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)
  have h_meas2 : Measurable (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) :=

  exact IndepFun.of_identDistrib_left (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n))
    (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_Iic ν a n) h_meas2

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  apply IndepFun.of_identDistrib_right (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (n + 1) (by omega))
  apply IndepFun.of_identDistrib_left
  · exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (n + 1) (by omega)).symm
  · exact indepFun_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

apply iIndepFun.indepFun_finset (s := {⟨n + 1, le_refl _⟩}) (t := Iic n |>.map ⟨fun i => ⟨i.1, Nat.lt_succ_of_le i.2⟩, fun _ _ h => Subtype.ext (Subtype.ext_iff.mp h)⟩)
  all_goals sorry

exact indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) 
    (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω i a)
    (measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1))
    (measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ by fun_prop))

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  sorry

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_meas1 : Measurable (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) :=
    measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)
  have h_meas2 : Measurable (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) :=
    Measurable.pi fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a i
  exact IndepFun.of_identDistrib (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n))
    (indepFun_eval_pi_eval_streamMeasure ν (n + 1) (fun i : Iic n ↦ (i : ℕ)) a
      (fun i hi ↦ (Nat.lt_succ_of_le (Subtype.mem i)).ne' (by simpa using hi)))
    (IdentDistrib.pi fun i ↦ identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a i
      (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mp (Nat.one_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_of_le (Subtype.mem i)))))

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_meas1 : Measurable (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) :=
    measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)
  have h_meas2 : Measurable (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) :=

  exact IndepFun.of_identDistrib_left

      (fun i hi ↦ by simp only [Set.mem_range, Subtype.exists] at hi; obtain ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩ := hi; omega))

exact IndepFun.of_map_eq_prod
    (measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1))
    (measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i))
    (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).map_eq

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_meas1 : Measurable (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) :=
    measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)
  have h_meas2 : Measurable (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) :=

  exact IndepFun.of_identDistrib_left (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n))

  have hR := h.measurable_R

  · exact Bandit.indepFun_eval_Iic ν a n
